info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' kzala ' DAtuH asyEva pAWAntaram iti bahavaH  kzIrasvAmI tu ' kzala saYcalane saYcaye ca ' iti pfTAgDAtuM paWati BvAdO

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'prAsya DArA akzaran' (f॰9.29.1 ) prAvahannityarTaH prakzara iti vAjino vAraRasya vA lohamayaH kavaco BavatItyABiDAnikAH
'indrasya soma jaWare samakzaraH' (f॰9.85.5) samakzaraH=samasyandaTAH
'tadaSru saNkzaritamAsIt' (Sa॰brA॰6.3.1.28)
'apAmaYjalI pUrayitvA tatsaviturvfRImaha iti pUrRenAsya pUrRamavakzArayitvA''sicya' (pARiM gfhRIyAt) (ASva0 gf0 120) nigadavyAKyAtam
'tasya yo raso vyakzarat' (Sa0 brA0 141111) vyakzarat=nirasyandata
'vikzarantaM mahAmeGam' (BA0 142184) vikzarantaM prasyandamAnam
'sA vikzarantI ruDiraM bahuDA GoradarSanA' (hari0 31824) vikzarantI=visravantI=syandamAnA
'mAtaraM pitaraM jAyAM BrAtaraM tanayaM gurum AkzArayan SataM dApyaH' (manu0 8275) AkzArayan dUzayan yaSo dUzayan dozeRa gacCan dozaBAg iti praKyApayan
'pUrvamAkzArayedyastu niyataM syAtsa pApaBAka' (nArada0) AkzArayet dozamAropayet
'yaH svalpenApi kAryeRa suhfdA''kzArito Bavet' (BA0 SAM0 8340) AkzArito DanagrahaRena riktaH syAdityarTa iti nIlakaRWaH
'yadyapyANpUrvasya kzarateH kzIRatAyAM prasidDirna kevalasya tu samasti tapaH kzarati vismayAdityAdizu darSanAt pUrvamAkzArito dozEH' (manu0 8354) AkzArito nindito'BiSastaH
'sutA indrAya vajriRe somAso daDyASiraH pavitramatyakzaran' (f0 96315) pavitrasyopari prAsyandanta
'ye te pavitramUrmayo'Bikzaranti DArayA' (f0 9615) aBikzaranti=aBisravanti=aBizyandante
'SivA aBi kzarantu tvApo divyAH payasvatIH' (aTarva0 8214)
'sinDurna nimnamaBi vAjyakzAH' (f0 99745) akzA iti kzaraterIqaBAve luNi rUpam
'mano vE samrAw paramaM brahma nEnaM mano jahAti sarvARyenaM BUtAnyaBikzaranti' (Sa0 brA0 1461015) uditapUrva evArTaH
'UrmiryaH pavitre paryakzarat' (f0 96411) paryakzarat parito'syandata
'pari RaH kzarA sahasriRIrizaH' (f0 9613) parikzara pravAhaya
'upa kzaranti sinDavo mayoBuva IjAnaM yakzyamARaM ca DenavaH' (f0 11254) samIpe kzaranti sravanti syandante prIRayantItyarTaH
'sarvato vA etAH svaDA yajamAnamupakzaranti yadetAni havIMzyAjyaM DAnAH karamBaH parivApaH puroqASaH payasyeti' (E0 brA0 85) ukto'rTaH
